notes: Andrey Kolmogorov, Russian mathematician behind Kolmogorov complexity and the theorem underpinning Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs). Stress lands on the third syllable ‚ÄĒ kohl-muh-GOR-uhf ‚ÄĒ and the final v is devoiced to an f, matching the Russian [k…ôlm…źňą…°or…ôf]. Cold readers usually get it wrong twice, stressing the first syllable and ending on a voiced ov.
